use_cases: Form submission triggers within hero sections or landing pages
Primary call-to-action buttons for user conversion flows
Navigation action triggers in marketing and SaaS interfaces
ai_summary: A reusable button component with multiple style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options, built with class-variance-authority for flexible theming and Radix UI Slot for composition patterns. Designed as an atomic input element for web interfaces.
